title: Butter Dish with Lid, Metal Butter Dish with Multi-Functional knife, Lightweight Unbreakable Butter Container for Countertop Upgrade Double Silicone Seal, 14x5x9cm,White
features: 【Large size＆metal material】This butter dish consists of metal material and a wooden lid with a knife.The inner diameter size is 3.5*5.5*2in, the size determines its large capacity, which can store most of the butter on the market. Metal materials are lighter and more resistant to falling. Durable, handy, no burden.

【Double silicone seal】The wooden lid has a detachable double silicone seal to keep the food from spoilling and keep the butter fresh and nutritious. Spread the bread smoothly without affecting the texture of the bread. To bring you and your family a good mood every morning.

【Multi-purpose butter knife】The product comes with a versatile butter knife that can be stored in a groove in the wooden lid. It saves space and is easy to access. When you want to eat butter you can use the wooden lid as a cutting board, use a butter knife for slicing, scraping, spreading, easy to eat.

【Beautiful＆practicable】Butter dish body white and elegant font placed in any corner of the home does not conflict, wood lid to enhance the whole kitchen atmosphere. High quality metal butter dish and sealing ring greatly improve the service life, give you a long time to accompany.

【Easy clean＆good gift】The butter dish can be easily cleaned with hot water and wet wipes.The upgraded kraft paper packaging is low-key and textured.It is a unique gift that family and friends will love.
description: Product Description Why choose our butter dish? This butter dish is not only the best in quality, appearance, capacity and seal, but also we have a new design of the new butter knife to meet your needs. After receiving the goods, you can find us at any time if you are not satisfied.We will give you our immediate attention and give you a satisfactory treatment.We're always here. Newly designed butter knife for more convenience in life In addition to the traditional effects of slicing and smearing butter, we also added serrations, small holes, and large holes. Serrated teeth - help cut butter quickly and neatly. Small holes - you can scrape out the butter Large hole - can scrape out butter strips New upgraded sealing system This butter dish with lid features a double layer of high-quality silicone seal. The silicone sealing ring is not easy to age, and the sealing effect is better. Airtight lid to prevent the butter dish from mixing with other flavors. Keeps butter dishes fresh and nutritious, protecting the health of you and your family. Easy To Clean The lid with a wipes or rinse it with water. After cleaning, dry the lid and keep it dry. Dishwasher support. Multi-Purpose The butter dish is not just a butter dish, it can also contain fruit snacks and so on. Perfect Gift Packed in a kraft carton, this butter butter is simple and elegant, making it the perfect gift. Your friends and family will love it.
